reviews.review_text: We camped had a lovely powered sites by the river..great showers great camp kitchen.just a warning there is the tavern across the river.. weekends they have bands can be a bit noisy
Lovely and kind people would recommend every time

Well maintained  with immaculate shower areas. The water frontage is beautiiful. Established park with alot of shade. Relaxed , attentive and accommodating managers. Given the change I'll pay another visit.

Excellent place for a family holiday. Affordable accomodation! Kids loved kayaking and fishing at the river right behind our cabin. Safe for kids to bike ride too. Beautiful green grass and shady trees. 10/10

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

An absolute gem of a getaway!

Huge thanks to Dwayne & Henrietta for making our stay legendary. From the warm welcome (mostly thanks to Officer M 🫡) and personalized golf‑cart tour, to the immaculate amenities, mint‑condition sites, and a location that basically shows off — everything was spot on.

Bonus entertainment: the dancing birds. Didn’t know we booked a wildlife talent show, but honestly, they stole the whole weekend..

All in all, a damn perfect stay. We’ll be back… more than once again 👍🏻
Very nice campground at a river with a great manager.
We loved this place! Amazingly friendly staff and got a campsite last minute! Definitely recommended!
Great park, clean amenities, quiet, nice outlook near river, nice pub across river, no meals though and just cash. Short drive to town.

We recently stayed here in an ensuite cabin. They handed us the key but when we walked in the room was uncleaned. unmade bed caught our eye first and looking around, we realised the bins were full and nothing had been tidied since the last guests.
We reported this to the owners and waited outside for over 30 minutes. When nobody showed up we had to go back to reception and report again. We had driven from Perth that day starting very early. We were totally exhausted and just eager to grab a quick shower and take a nap. Instead we had to stand outside for very long.
The location itself is beautiful, peaceful, and convenient. They even offer free canoes for guests. Unfortunately the service we received wasn’t satisfactory.

2 nights on a unpowered pitch. Didn’t have a booking but Dwayne was happy to find us space a show us around. Would definitely stay here again, unfortunately didn’t have time to take one of the canoes out but think it’s fantastic they’re available for use! Thanks Dwayne!
Pretty impressive and pub 🍻 next door has good drinks

We rang out of the blue when other parks were full . The manager here said he should be able to find us a site to stay . He was very helpful and friendly the park was well maintained.  Made to feel welcome.  Thanks for the friendly service. Reasonable price too .

The owner is very accommodating and will try to squeeze you in somehow. Expect to be very tightly packed in. Even the parking spaces between cabins occupied by permanents may be used as a camp site. The ablutions were reasonably clean but the lack of soap and toilet paper in 2 out of 4 cubicles was unacceptable. There are very few riverside sites. The property is close to a busy road so there is traffic noise.

The owner is very accommodating and will try to squeeze you in somehow. Expect to be very tightly packed in. Even the parking spaces between cabins occupied by permanents may be used as a camp site. The ablutions were reasonably clean but the lack of soap and toilet paper in 2 out of 4 cubicles was unacceptable. There are very few riverside sites. The property is close to a busy road so there is traffic noise.

Unfortunately our site was right by the highway and we could hear the road trains at night.
The bathrooms are clean, however the shower stall I used was quite blocked up.
Seems there are some permanent residences at the camp, which makes it feel more like a trailer park.
We throughly enjoyed our stay here, nice place, creek, no bugs, hot showers and very friendly boss

King River palm caravan park is one of the best hide parks around (am old school park)
The owen is out making sure people are happy and showing them to there site
If you want you kids to have fun this it the place to go
Right next to the river to cool off when it hot or go for a fish

I am doing a lap of australia at the moment wish I could spend more time here  but I will definitely be coming back here

Stop and read this honest review.

Accommodation: 3 nights on a powered site with water.

We called last minute and spoke with the male owner who kindly managed to fit us in. On arrival we were welcomed by his wife. It is a family run park and the service from both of them was outstanding.

It was some of the best customer service we have experienced at a caravan park. We were treated more like friends than guests which made the stay feel personal.

The park itself is beautiful and well kept and it has definitely made our shortlist of places we will be returning to for a longer stay.

Thank you King River Palms!

The fella running this caravan park is second to none with his customer service, ease of communication and willingness to help.
If you are ever in need of a place to stay around Albany this has to be the best choice by far. Cannot recommend this park enough.
Absolutely pleasant stay, affordable and very welcoming.

Beautiful grounds by the river & squeaky clean ammenities, so well maintained & incredibly kind and welcoming owners. We ended up here after our radiator gave out on a road trip from Victoria. Dwayne welcomed us in and gave us a space to not only stay but also fix and replace our radiator. Incredibly grateful. Thankyou King River Palms team

I spent 3 nights alongside the river. What a beautiful spot!
Great owners - friendly & helpful. Will definitely stay here again.
Sandy

Wonderful family run park with the best views on the King River. The owners are super relaxed and super helpful, we were ever so grateful to be helped out with some last minute accommodation. Liked it so much we extended our stay!  Clean facilities and great camp sites.

This is a great traditional park with such a warm Family feel. Whilst the cabin I stayed in is on the side of old and tired it had everything I required and was spotlessly clean as is everything else in this park. This family operated business is warm and caring, they helped out so many ppl on the Australia Day weekend that were turned back at Ravensthorpe due to the national park fires. This made the park interesting and overflowing but no one seemed to mind and were happy to be flexible. Love the 10pm curfew which everyone honoured, a good nights sleep  makes all the difference. 💚💛
Excellent CP. Extremely friendly when booking in. Relaxed atmosphere. Washing machines $4.
Nice but overcrowded, everyone is parked where they can fit, it can be a bit wild. Good facilities and conveniently located

We had a fantastic stay at King River Palms Caravan Park. The owner were incredibly friendly and welcoming and even though the park was fully booked but the owner makes room for us.
We really appreciated the warm hospitality and will absolutely stay again. Highly recommend.
Bueno, bonito y barato
老闆人很好！！提供了我們聖誕節假期有地方住，廁所乾淨

We had a fantastic stay at King River Palms Caravan Park. The hosts were incredibly friendly and welcoming. Dwayne was exceptionally accommodating, especially given it was New Year’s Eve, and went out of his way to make room for us even though the park was fully booked.

The park itself was clean, well maintained, and the amenities were spotless. You can tell a lot of care goes into the place. We really appreciated the warm hospitality and will absolutely stay again. Highly recommend.

We called to ask if there was any space during the holiday season when every other place was completely booked out. The owner answered and said that while they were pretty full, we shouldn’t worry and he will find us a spot and wouldn't leave us without a place to sleep.
When we arrived, he did exactly as promised and found us a great site with power and everything we needed. He was incredibly kind, welcoming, and patient.
Highly recommended

Amazing caravan park. We just spent one night here unfortunately, we would love to stay longer. The guy from Receptionist was a legend and he saved our night in Albany finding us an spot. You have kitchen and bbq. The shower has good pressure. The Christmas decorations were so cool though. The facilities were really clean. Thanks! We would love to come back again.

The Pro
- Beautiful location along the river
- Dwayne was very friendly and helpful
- Good amenities
- Short walk to the local pub

The Cons
- Nothing for us

Tips
- Ask for a site along the river, we had a lovely corner spot

Would I stay here again?
Absolutely yes!

Nice place right beside the river. We enjoyed our stay in a cozy, clean cabin and used it as a home base for several outings in and around Albany. Owners made us feel welcome and obviously spend a lot of time on keeping the park well maintained. Christmas lights at night!
Extremely well laid out and well maintenance. Staff professional and friendly.

Very disappointing. Lady at the reception was too busy taking a phone call instead of our check in. We paid $40 by card, later heard that other unpowered sites people paid $35 cash. Lady didn’t provide us with a map, sites are very close to each other. Many permanent residents on this park, looked messy and were very loud. We wanted to cook in the camp kitchen next to unpowered sites, however they charge you $2 to use the bbq approx a couple of minutes. While the bbq’s next to the amenities were free. Showers and toilets were clean though.
On the river, it doesn’t get much better than that but it does. Amenities were always clean and the staff were very friendly and helpful. Loved exploring around!

This caravan park is on a nice river, however it is also on a main road that is busy all night long so not a great place to get a peaceful rest. We were not provided with a map or any park information upon checking in and were given vauge instructions to find our site it took us a few goes unfortunately.  The park has nice and clean facilities but given the busy loud road all night we wouldnt stay again. The tavern across the river played loud music on a Saturday night until midnight so not for everyone.
Awesome park. Excellent owner great character and well looked after. 👌 we would recommend the park. 👍😋

Great family run park. Felt very welcome and safe.
We loved being right by the river and paddle on the free canoes.
Lots of ducks walking around and a little playground.
Laundry was clean and cheapest we've come across which was nice!!
Schade, dass weder via Mail noch Telefon auf Anfragen geantwortet wird. Wir hätten gerne gebucht.
Nice surroundings, good amenities and the proprietor was very friendly and accommodating.

Très bon caravan park et propre. Je recommande
Cependant, je n’ai pas comprit les changements de tarifs certains soirs!

Have been here twice in 2 years and could not recommend high enough, Dwain and Henrietta the owners are very pleasant and accommodating and no mark up because of long weekends or school holidays and big sites for anyone like me with 5th wheeler for grey nomads no paying for all those kid things like bouncing pillows that we don't use.
Quiet park. Met with excellent staff . 👌

I chose this park from other reviews. The park is small and quite a pretty park as it sits on the river. We had a good site near the amenities as requested. I can see that a site on the river in beautiful weather would be perfect. I know that parks require permanent /semi permanent residents to enable them to operate but there were a large number of sites that were unkempt and lower the tone of any park. At $45 a night for power in my opinion was not value for money

We made our booking later in the afternoon, and the owners were kind enough to accommodate us — which we really appreciated. The ablution block was clean and well-kept, and there are plenty of clotheslines along with a spacious laundry area. You can tell the owners take real pride in their campground — the whole place is spotless. There is a beautiful river running along the side of the camp. Thank you.

Amazing spot on the river. Travelling with kids and dog and can not stress enough how good this location is. Park is amazing, facilities are always clean. Third time back in the last two months. Multiple river frontage sites and fully grassed (kid and dog so no mess in caravan)

Great caravan park. As an English lad seeing a previous negative review from a fellow Brit I was a little apprehensive but it couldn’t have been further from the truth. The Park owners are nothing short of friendly and very welcoming! It’s a very relaxed atmosphere, beautiful scenery and amazing facilities. Having done a lap of Aus this spot is up there with the best!

Great customer service it's a old park but it's backs up to a lovely river were you can just walk it's also dog friendly and even a lady at the park called Sue will look after your pooch, if you ask her nicely just a small donation so you can go out to national parks etc. Toilet block are old but kept immaculate clean also camp kitchen lovely. Powered site were clean and grassed.
Beautiful spot out of school holiday period

Fantastic place.
Close but not too close to Albany hustle and bustle.
Good family fun available, with fishing in the river 10m from the caravan, close access to Lower King or Nanarup.
Owner is a Top bloke, always happy to help and have a yarn. This is a dinkie die Aussie caravan park. Trees a plenty, grass, chilled holiday destination.
Highly recommend.

Our daughter in law n Son, bubs, her Parents and 2 poodles came to King River over the Easter break, booking hubby n me plus our pup in for 2 nights, they had their caravans while we jus had our pop up tent .Dwayne amazingly fitted us in at a very busy time of yr nxt to a resident Con who made us feel welcome, playing chess with hubby n letting us taste his catch of the day.We had a beautiful view of the river as well as bonding time with family at such a exquisite location. I even discovered a hidden talent of hubby's as we had a picnic at The Serinity tree,was a absolute amazing time,only issue I had was hubby snoring on 1 side,my pomerian  snoring other side n a group of travellers drinking into the early hrs of a sanctified day,Easter Sunday even Dwayne went to church....
Otherwise a great stay looking forward to coming again

在復活節長假期下
很多露營地已經訂不到
還好King River老闆安排了一個位子給我們
老闆人很好知道長假期非常忙碌
盡可能安排大家入住
但也因為這樣露營地變得非常擁擠
有些吵鬧
但是環境很安靜
乾淨的廚房和浴室

Last-minute cabin booking on Easter weekend! Lovely lady called us to upgrade the cabin! All ammenities , excellent service extra hot showers is perfect. This cabin felt like pure luxury as we are used to sleeping in a swag.

We booked for 7 weeks over Christmas & stayed 11 weeks, we had a big, concrete site on the river, got a visit nearly everyday by 2 Mallard ducks. Dwayne & his family & staff kept the park spotless with mowing the grass sites, watering & keeping the amenities clean with the park nearly full during this time of year.

Amazing park. Very clean and tidy.
Owners and staff very friendly and helpful..
Stayed for 9 months due to work .
Home away from home 😔
Thanks
Cruisy! Made feel very welcome

Loved it here peace and quiet.
The Owners were amazing.
Ducks on the river (even came up for a feed)
The Wife is telling me to say Just Beautiful.
What an amazing place to stay. Location is beautiful. Facilities clean, with great showers. Beats any other caravan park in the area.❤️
Nice little park. About 10 - 15 minutes away from town. Friendly staff. Old but nice amenities.
Had a last minute stay, owners very accommodating and had a choice of sites. The sites, toilet/showers and kitchen were clean and easy access. The whole family enjoyed our stay!
What a quaint wonderful place to stop! Rang late but was given a site anyway.  Polite and funny caretakers! It’s a must do!

Paid 35$ per night, two people, unpowered site. The caravan park is big and popular but very quiet. We had great time there, the owner was very friendly and helpful. Spotless amenities and camp kitchen, possibly the cleanest we've ever found.
Very close to Albany and many other amazing places.
Would definitely recommend and looking forward to coming back!

A beautiful stay at King River Palms with clean and working amenities. We stayed in a cabin this time but some of our friends camped right by the river and we all thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

The owners are so lovely and accomodating, they are understanding that people are driving after work from Perth to Albany on a long weekend for a holiday and so therefore might need to check in a little later and were willing to work with us to accomodate this.

Highly recommend staying here, the area is beautiful, the view of the stars at night is amazing and the staff are very kind & welcoming.

Camped here for 2 nights on our motorcycles
Lots of grass and shady areas
Camp kitchen, shower facilities and coin operated laundry were clean
Campsite was really nice and cosy
Locals were friendly and Dwayne was very accomodating for our last minute booking
We couldn’t have asked for anything better
Thanks!

Lovely caravan park. Right on the river. Lots of trees decent site sizes. The ablutions and laundry are fairly new and kept  nice and clean.
Staff are so friendly and helpful. Look forward to our next stay.
Dwayne & Harriot thank you we booked for 1 and we were able to stay 3  great location and great that everyone not packed in and good price compared to other parks.

Positives: fitted us in last minute. Clean, warm showers with good pressure. Nice river for fishing with use of free canoes. Quiet at night. Other patrons very friendly.

Negatives: the lady who checked us in was very rude and sarcastic, we expressed to her that we had a bad day and were thankful to be accommodated, her response was ‘boohoo poor you’ in sarcastic tone. She also made a ‘joke’ about ‘letting people from the UK stay’ like we were not welcome. The prices seemed very fluid when being discussed, and we were told it was $15 per extra person, on checking the site after leaving we saw it should have been $5 p/p - makes you wonder if we were overcharged purposely due to being from the UK?
We were then pulled up by the male owner for not checking out at 10am, when this was never mentioned in checkin instructions, perhaps the lady could spend more time giving patrons valuable info about their stay rather than making sarcastic comments.
Sites very close together squeezed in.
As mentioned by other reviewers lots of permanent residents making the place feel a little like a shanty town, no issue for us but does make it look messy.

We have stayed in lots of other free camps on our trip and appreciate the rules may be different on a paid site, but this is the first paid site we have stayed on so would have absolutely taken kind guidance if required not condescension.
Beautiful, plenty of shade, friendly camp-site with on-site vans and cabins and good amenities.   Far enough from the city to be rural, but only a few minutes from the shops or the beach.

Great place to stay so laid back but professional the owners are best if they can help they do. The river runs through great for fishing swimming and they even have canoes for anyone to use. Another caravan park we will revisit not too far out of Albany and good beaches

We called last minute looking for a camping spot for 3 tents and 2 cars. Amazing experience ! Not only we were received and acommodated by the owners but they were also very friendly, kind , nice and gave us a spot right next to their home where we felt like glamping.  Thank you!!  The facilities are great from the clean toilets and showers with good music in the background , to the laundry and kitchen facilities.  The park is the best place i have stayed in about 6 times  i have been down to Albany. 100% recommended
Wonderful quiet clean and beautiful location for a getaway. Was so happy we used the camping ground

Great caravan park nice and clean. The owners are very friendly. Very relaxing
Paige the dog gives it a 5, nice and very friendly nearly everyone stop and patted and talked to me.

Amazing place to stay- Kids loved the canoes on the river (no charge), kids played in the playground and in/ next to the river. Was planning to stay 2 nights and ended up extending another 3 days! Awesome fellow campers, awesome owners. Super clean facilities! Loved it!

Dwayne fitted us in right away with just a phone call the day before. Nice spot for our roof top tent down by the river. Lovely service and friendly. gorgeous river with plenty of tree cover, grass and bird life. Showers clean and good water pressure. Great stay if in region. 5/5
This place is great, really friendly and helpful owners, excellent communal areas, great location by the river. Recommended.

We were lucky Dwayne found us a spot with a days notice a few days before New Years. Great spot just out of town, right on the river. Heaps of bream and trumpeters kept the kids busy forever, canoes, rope swings into the river, friendly locals, tavern across the river, we had a great time, 5 stars!

We had a lovely stay, owner was great finding us a non power site for 2 night.
You do need to drive to find food.
We would definitely stay here again.
Super accommodating even though he was fully booked he managed to find us somewhere
Great site to have a base whilst exploring the local area. Friendly owner and welcoming. Thanks for having us, Liam and Meg.

Nice park with large kitchen for all members to use, gas BBQs with kitchen dining and fridge, hotplates microwave and kettle, playground for children, nice green grass for campers with tents and caravan park in..
Great park with amenities and hot 🚿 showers.. lots of trees for shade.. beautiful nature sounds and quiet location not too far from highway/main road..

Great outdoor walks around the park situated by the King River, great for a short or long holiday break.. people are kind and friendly.. enjoyed the stay.. thanks..

Great camping spot. Clean amenities; camp kitchen well supplied; friendly easygoing host; beautiful gardens and river views; access to amenities without a key; and all for $40/ night powered site. Very happy camper!

Very relaxed park with basic amenities. Nice riverside spots that aren’t formally contained. Fire pits available, kayaks. Very quiet park with hot showers. Approx 10 kms to town, tavern across road. Well kept park with a lot of permanents.

Great caravan park. We stayed in an unpowered tent site. Great view of the river. Birdsong a lovely morning wakeup. Shame about the big trucks on the adjacent road and the band at the pub bot these were tolerable. 10min to center of Albany and 45 min to the Porongurups d Stirling Range. Fish in the river too.
Beautiful park best caravan park I have stayed so far friendly staff and fair price!
Cute little cabins. Fully contained. Didn't need much, just a place to sleep for a few nights. Not expensive, either.

Beautiful caravan park along the King River.
Close enough to town to be convenient, but far enough away to feel relaxed 🙂
A quaint little business with tranquil surrounds, friendly and knowledgeable owners.

After travelling from Bolwarra NSW with my sister & brother-inlaw staying at several parks & free camps we stopped at King River Palms Albany WA. with plans to stay 2 nights and moving on, the parks owners Dwayne & Henrietta were absolutely great people giving us 2 river front sites, we decided to stay an extra 2 nights the park was great we ended up staying 7 nights. The facilities were clean & tidy but the owners Honestly made the stay even better it was like catching up with long lost friends.I highly recommend having a stay at King River Palms Caravan Park.
Nice bush setting beside river. Staff great.
A pleasant Caravan Park on the King River.  Roomy sites. Good amenities.  Highly recommend.

One of the best parks we have stayed in on our trip from Qld. Right beside the river. Grandkids caught fish from the free canoe’s. Where else do you get free canoe’s. Host are amazing and very helpful. Beautifully kept grounds with spotless amenities. The bigger parks should get back to this kind of hospitality. We didn’t want to leave. Would definitely recommend to everyone.

Great place to stay.
Friendly staff and very clean

We didn't have a stay for the night and called half an hour before we rocked up at the caravan park, without any problems. Super nice owners! A super cute caravan park, not too big, clean facilities!!
We would highly recommend it

LOOK NO FURTHER if you like a caravan park that doesn't give you rules, keys and codes but where everyone respects each other,  immaculate bathroom facilities,  large grassy sites and very friendly hosts.
Right on the edge of King River and close to Albany it is a perfect base while sightseeing.  Definitely recommend... this park is a credit to Dwayne & Henrietta
Beautiful caravan park , the owners are beautiful people, lovely clean amenities, right on the river , a quick drive into Albany, I would highly recommend, this site

Dwyane and Henrietta are absolute gems! We have stayed here repeatedly for work and pleasure and they always accommodate us even when it is a last minute trip. They are always friendly and nothing is too hard for them.

I strongly recommend sitting down by the river at any time of day. It is such a peaceful view and so beautiful! Well worth staying that little bit further out of Albany!
Really friendly family who run this place.  Couldn't help us enough, made us feel very welcome.
Such a lovely place to stay for 2 nights. Very clean and, although busy, didn’t feel too packed in. Would definitely recommend and return

Cannot thank these guys enough! We got stuck not finding a place to camp and it got pretty late at night, we tried our chances with calling and not only did they pick up, they were fully booked and still made a spot for us to stay! Thank you so much for helping us out! The owner was super friendly and welcoming and the park itself was very nice!
Would definitely recommend staying here!

We recently stayed at the King River Palms Caravan Park. The hosts were amazing, the grounds were well maintained and very clean. The river creates a beautiful backdrop to the park. Facilities were very good. I highly recommend this Caravan Park.  Definitely be back!!!!
We loved our stay here! had e beautiful spot right at the river where we could even catch black bream! was one of our favorite camping!

Lovely spots by the river..
Great owners and enjoyed our stay.

The owner kindly allowed our group to stay after our initial accommodation plans fell through, he took us in and gave us a nice grassed spot with water/power access.

Friendly/nice staff, great facilities and overall good experience.

We'll be staying here again in the future.
Amazing park right on the river! Lots of things for the children to do, Wayne was very friendly accommodating all our needs. Can’t wait to come back soon
Stayed 3 nights on a powered site by the river lovely views. Park was clean and amenities were clean. Owners were very friendly and helpful. Will definitely be back.

One of the best parks we have been in. Green grass good amenities service impeccable nothing is a problem . It is so beautiful. 3 weeks of caravanning pure bliss.

Brett

Après avoir testé une dizaine de camping dans le coin c’est de loin le meilleur la cuisine est très grande il y a tout ce qu’il faut ! La salle de bain est très propre et grande très bon service rien à redire je conseille vivement !

Very beautiful park set under the trees and right on the river, they had canoes for us to use and we had a lovely paddle up the river. Facilities are very clean and well maintained and the owners are lovely and welcoming. Will be back!

A friendly, clean pleasant few nights, next to the river. Dog friendly
Wondering ducks and rooster

This caravan park was amazing, not to mention the family that lives on the premises to ensure you have a great stay but also the environment and people around you are amazing. Caught heaps of fish in the river running behind the park with plenty of wood that can be used for a nice and warm wood fire in the afternoon.

Definitely recommend this stay to anyone who is looking for a relaxing and easy going stay.

Thank you very much for providing this stay for us, we very much enjoyed our stay!
Loved this spot, a very positive vibe here.
Fabulous caravan park. Very accommodating when we rang wanting to come early. The office staff were fantastic and always there to help.

Fantastic caravan park with very helpful friendly owners - very quiet & peaceful - we parked right on the side of the river which was brilliant - ensuite type toilets which were always in great condition & very clean - very affordable price reduced for week long stay - great for families with free use of canoe on the water & play area - permanents in the camp were very friendly & helpful as well - even the very large drake duck who liked to watch us but yes we did keep our distance from him - overall a great place to stay & we will be back - many thanks guys ...

This place was a breath of fresh air. A very relaxed vibe here Nestled  amongst nature by the river with beautiful trees and birds with green grassy sites. Its close enough to town too.the owners are very welcoming and accommodating. Will definitely stay here again.

Stayed for a while, whilst our annex was being fixed. Great little park on the river. Playground equipment could use a revamp and some better surfacing underneath as my youngest fell off the swing and had a massive bruise from a tree root underneath it. But these things happen. Lovely permanent residents, be sure to say hi to Sue.

We stayed with our Caravan for 2 weeks near the river. What a great spot, looking  both morning and night at the river. Great  laundry with even one washing machine with warm and hot washing and one dryer. Very big campkitchen with all the usual. Amenities and everything else are very clean. The owners and all staff are very friendly and helpfull. I wish all caravan parks were all run like this one.
Great quiet park . Friendly permanent residents good location
Amazing family run park. Henrietta and Dwayne love having a chat.Rural atmosphere. Best park we have been in so far in WA having come down from Kununurra onwards. Highly recommended. $35/n.

On arrival, Henrietta showed us sites available to choose where wanted to stay. That evening delivered scones, cream and jam as a welcome! Loved the informality of the park, no gestapo type rules, very flexible. All facilities were clean and spotless. Small family owned park. Best of all our trip of the sth west WA. Well done!
Quite good for the price of van site
Great park awesome people that own the park. Great location and super clean amenities. Highly recomended.
